Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}I didn't think we'd win so many... This was fun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}It was probably mostly luck, though. Come to think of it, I've always been pretty lucky...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Like with that contest. I didn't really want to win anything, and I didn't think I would...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11250 0 0}D-Do you think it's okay for me to be in the finals?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11255 0 0}{f 5 13 11 30 108}Well... when you put it like that, I guess it's okay.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}You've got a real mature outlook on things... and I'm supposed to be the senpai here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga is looking at me with respect.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11221 0 0}{f 5 13 11 15 108}Y-Yeah, that's what everyone keeps telling me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess I just get nervous because I never really had any proper training...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga seems a little embarrassed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11226 0 0}Th-That's not true! There were a lot of great contestants from other schools![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 3 25 25}I don't care what you say about me, but you shouldn't put down other people like that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like Hiraga doesn't want[n]to talk about this anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, this was a nice change of pace since I've been so busy with club activities lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11293 0 0}We should head back in a little bit. I have to start working even harder as soon as possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The two of us hung out for a little longer[n]and then I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
